title: Some really weird Directors cut EP 23 scenes
display_title: Some really weird Directors cut EP 23 scenes
wikitext:
[]: Some really weird Director's cut EP 23 scenes             Quote Post by hwdge » Sat Jan 26, 2013 6:05 pm So i just watched some director's cut of ep23 and saw this craaaaazy weird stuff GNR ? (the angel gets sucked in) (getting creepy) (creepy) about now you hear this really disturbing moan, it sounds like its coming from Rei but i can't be sure and then boom she explodes What did i just watch? anyone have any idea? [/img]

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Sat Jan 26, 2013 6:17 pm I have my own ideas, but they're not nearly organized enough to be posted here. I'll let someone more experienced than I take the reigns here. This was indeed one of the more baffling scenes of the anime for me in my first watch. I was lucky the streaming site I used had the DC episodes instead of the broadcast versions.

[]:             Quote Post by GetOvaDaBridge » Sat Jan 26, 2013 6:22 pm Is this your first time watching the series? Or did you watch the unaltered episodes first then watched the DC episodes later on in no particular order? Just wondering.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jan 26, 2013 6:39 pm Related http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/10281/In-Episode-23/

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Jan 26, 2013 7:28 pm Well, what this does imply is that Rei probably had some inner desire to hug Shinji like this (Hence her realization that "her heart is doing this", probably means something like, "Wait, it went after me because it needs an adam-based EVA to ressurect its brethren, but it's going after him because it's fusing with me") , but being the good person she is, she would rather give up on any chance to be with him if the only way they can be together is for him to become lunch for Armisael... But seriously, that hand/skin growth thing is creepy, especially how larger Rei heads kept popping out of the mouths of smaller ones... Logic says that Shinji would need to have these... things cut off, but he doesn't have any bandages on his hands afterwards. Maybe the effect was undone when Rei pulled Armisael out of the respective parts EVA 01? The mini GNR was probably the result or Armisael fully fusing with EVA 00 (note the halo), she might have been blown up just in time to avert TI. The bloated core after absorbing armisael is probably meant to evoke a pregnant belly in some grotesque faction, the whole sequence is full for squicky reproductive imagery. You noticed the *gulp* steak of implied mentrual blood in Armisael!Rei's shadow? And if you look closely, there's one or two shots where Rei's nipples are clearly errect below the plugsuit, while the Angel "penetates" her. *shudders* Poor thing. Still, Armisael is a smart one. If she has to take the shape of a human, pick the one who has the most fanboys! /silly.

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Sat Jan 26, 2013 10:21 pm Leave it to Anno to take an already painful to watch scene, and make it visually disturbing as hell. I always figured that the faces was a resualt of the Angel affecting Shinji's AT Field. The personal one that keeps humans from tanging. It's intruding in on this with the feelings it carried over from Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by sum_exsanguis » Sat Jan 26, 2013 10:35 pm the angel tower is still the one thing that blows my mind out of all that sequence

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Sun Jan 27, 2013 10:38 am I do wonder what sort of nightmares Shinji had the days after that event.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Jan 27, 2013 11:52 am Kendrix wrote: The bloated core after absorbing armisael is probably meant to evoke a pregnant belly in some grotesque faction, the whole sequence is full for squicky reproductive imagery. You noticed the *gulp* steak of implied mentrual blood in Armisael!Rei's shadow? And if you look closely, there's one or two shots where Rei's nipples are clearly errect below the plugsuit, while the Angel "penetates" her. *shudders* Poor thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sun Jan 27, 2013 11:52 am Dream wrote: I do wonder what sort of nightmares Shinji had the days after that event.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Jan 27, 2013 11:56 am Stryker wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sun Jan 27, 2013 12:02 pm Not in the slightest.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jan 27, 2013 12:55 pm Accurate depiction of the female orgasm.  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Jan 27, 2013 1:16 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Accurate depiction of the female orgasm.  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sun Jan 27, 2013 1:28 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Accurate depiction of the female orgasm.  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Sun Jan 27, 2013 1:29 pm Stryker wrote: If you look carefully, it looks like Rei is grinning. She's enjoying herself.

[]:             Quote Post by sum_exsanguis » Sun Jan 27, 2013 9:08 pm just noticed...what happened to the power cable into her back?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Jan 27, 2013 9:58 pm riffraff11235 wrote: That actually stood out to me the very first time I watched the DC episodes. Needless to say, it was creepy as hell.

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Sun Jan 27, 2013 9:59 pm Man Anno has issues. And maybe something against Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Jan 27, 2013 10:07 pm All the pilots got some form of angel rape so it's not like she was particularly singled out. They just react very differently to the situation; Rei takes it down with her, Asuka curls up into a ball of trauma, and Shinji... seems to have largely forgotten about it as soon as he could breathe again.
